entity.summary: Chiliz ecosystem automated-market-maker decentralized exchange providing fan-token and IP-backed-token liquidity, spot token swaps, liquidity pools, and protocol fee generation.
entity.notes: Current first-party FanX application is reachable. DefiLlama independently classifies FanX Protocol as an AMM DEX on Chiliz and reports current TVL, fees, revenue, and DEX volume. HEI consolidates Kayen and FanX Protocol discovery representations under one exchange identity.

evidence.title: FanX Protocol official application
evidence.notes: Current dedicated first-party FanX application endpoint is reachable at review time.

evidence.title: FanX Protocol metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry classifies FanX Protocol as a Chiliz AMM DEX and reports current TVL, fees, revenue, and DEX volume.

evidence.title: FanX Protocol exchange discovery entries
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies FanX Protocol on Chiliz; HEI consolidates the Kayen domain row and FanX source representation into one entity.
